description: Create a Price Book named 'Premium Partner Pricing Q1 2025' in Vtiger CRM. Set the Price Book to Active, use US Dollar currency, and include the description: 'Discounted pricing tier for Premium Partner accounts. Valid January through March 2025.' Associate the following products with their respective list prices: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headset' at $59.99, 'USB-C Docking Station' at $119.99, and 'Ergonomic Keyboard Pro' at $99.99. Ensure the product associations are saved.

metadata.expected_description: Discounted pricing tier for Premium Partner accounts. Valid January through March 2025.
